CREATE TABLE test_files (file_path VARCHAR(255), file_mode INTEGER);
SELECT os_chmod(file_path, bit_or(cast(file_stat(file_path, 2) as integer), 2)) FROM test_files WHERE file_path = '/path/to/testfile1';
UPDATE test_files SET file_mode = os_chmod(file_path, bit_or(cast(file_stat(file_path, 2) as integer), 1)) WHERE file_path = '/path/to/testfile2';
SELECT file_path, os_chmod(file_path, bit_or(cast(file_stat(file_path, 2) as integer), 6)) AS new_mode FROM test_files WHERE file_mode < 700;
SELECT file_path FROM test_files WHERE os_chmod(file_path, 444) IS NULL;
SELECT os_chmod(file_path, 0) FROM test_files HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT os_chmod(file_path, bit_and(cast(file_stat(file_path, 2) as integer), 3)) FROM test_files WHERE file_mode = 755;
SELECT os_chmod(file_path, 400) FROM test_files WHERE file_mode < 600 ORDER BY file_path;
SELECT os_chmod(virtuoso_ini_path(), case when file_mode = 644 then 640 else 600 end) FROM test_files;
